flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Fortis College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (252 vs 338).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fortis College rose 16% between 2014 and 2017 ($12.9k → $15.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fortis College rose 16% between 2014 and 2017 ($12.9k → $15.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Fortis College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (45.2% vs 51.3%).
